ABOUT
At Synontech, we pride ourselves in creating useful tools
that can be used in a variety of fields. These include various
AI tools, productivity tools and video games.
KerfSuite has been developed with workshops in mind. Our
tools are made to be used in factories, workshops and by
hobbyists in the manufacturing and woodworking fields.
Currently the only tool available in the suite, is KerfCut. As
this is the first tool to be released, and the first one that will
be put into consumer’s hands. Currently being developed is
the sister application, KerfStock, which seamlessly integrates
with KerfCut, allowing users to easily access accurate stock
lists of mterial to be used with KerfCut. The bonus of having
the applications work in tandem, is that any off-cuts produced
by KerfCut, are immediately loaded into the stock lists, and
saved with their exact sizes, as well as a code which will
be tied to the job the off-cut came from. This means that there
will never be lost items.
Serious tools.
KerfCut has been developed to
assist with saving material while
using CNC flatbeds, guillotines,
and cut-off saws. The optimized
cut files save not only time by
allowing the user to spend less
time worrying about waste, and
allows users to instead focus on
cutting.
KerfStock is the sister application
to KerfCut, and allows user to
quickly access accurate stock
lists of materials easily. The tool
will be available in both desktop,
mobile and web versions.
